scopes.name: storage:events:write
scopes.comment: Required for ALL USERS to submit game scores. Users must have this permission granted in their permission group.

scopes.name: storage:bizevents:read
scopes.comment: Required for ALL USERS to view leaderboards via DQL queries. Users must have this permission granted in their permission group.

scopes.name: document:documents:read
scopes.comment: Required for ALL USERS to access document service endpoints (list/read). Even public documents require this scope to call the API endpoints.

scopes.name: document:documents:write
scopes.comment: Required for ADMINS to upload and update scenarios.

scopes.name: document:documents:delete
scopes.comment: Required for ADMINS to delete scenarios.

scopes.name: document:documents:admin
scopes.comment: Required for ADMINS to manage scenarios (upload, modify, delete, rebuild index). Regular users get automatic access via originAppId.

scopes.name: app-settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: Required for reading app settings (event mode, remote Grail configuration).

scopes.name: app-settings:objects:write
scopes.comment: Required for ADMINS ONLY to configure app settings via Admin page.

branding.name: Branding & Theming
branding.description: Customer logo, colours and event name for white-label deployments

remote-grail.name: Remote Grail Tenant
remote-grail.description: Configure remote Dynatrace tenant for all business event storage and querying
